title: Inspection Step
description: Schema for an inspection step within a scope of work. Defines inspection type, acceptance criteria, test methods, and hold point requirements for quality assurance.

inspection_id.description: Unique identifier for this inspection step.

title.description: Human-readable title for the inspection step.

scope_ref.description: Reference to the parent scope_of_work record.

timing.description: When the inspection should occur relative to work operations.

acceptance_criteria.description: Criteria that must be met for the inspection to pass.

test_method_ref.description: Reference to the test method or standard used.

responsible_party.description: Party responsible for performing the inspection.

hold_point.description: Whether work must stop until this inspection passes.

evidence_required.description: Whether photographic or documented evidence must be captured.
